content.question: What proportion of Poland's reported 30% increase in autism SEN identification (2022–2023) is attributable to real prevalence change versus improved diagnostic awareness versus activation of finance incentives created by per-pupil disability weighting in the 2025 funding algorithm?
content.reduction_path: Comparative longitudinal analysis of identification rates in Polish regions with differential funding uptake and Counselling Centre capacity; cross-national diagnostic validation studies using identical criteria (DSM-5 or ICD-11) across cohorts; expert panels reviewing whether diagnostic thresholds or gate-keeping practice shifted contemporaneously with 2025 funding reform
